scenes.description: 小熊站在木屋前,发现巨大的豌豆藤蔓突然生长,兔子和其他小动物被困在藤蔓上,显得惊恐不安。画面从平静转为紧张。
scenes.video_prompt: A cute yellow bear in blue overalls stands in front of a wooden cottage, looking up in shock as a giant twisted pea vine rapidly grows into the sky. Several small animals, including a frightened rabbit, cling to the vine's writhing tendrils. The background features lush greenery and a bright blue sky. The scene begins with a wide static shot, then zooms in on the bear’s alarmed face. Rendered in vibrant cartoon style with soft lighting and high saturation, 16:9 aspect ratio, 4K resolution, smooth animation at 24fps.

style_elements.characters: Yellow bear in blue overalls; scared rabbit and tiny animals on vine
style_elements.environment: Wooden cottage, sunny meadow with green plants and clear sky
style_elements.camera_movement: Wide static start, slow zoom to bear's face

scenes.description: 小动物们在不断攀升的藤蔓上尖叫,藤蔓如面条般扭曲蔓延至屋顶,小熊决定救援,伙伴鼓励它合作解决问题。
scenes.video_prompt: The giant pea vine spirals upward like cooked noodles, entangling the cottage roof as panicked animals scream from its coils. A determined little bear prepares to climb, encouraged by two off-screen friends shouting support. Sunlight flickers through swaying leaves. Camera follows the vine’s ascent with a dynamic tracking shot, then cuts to low-angle view of the bear stepping forward bravely. Stylized animation with bouncy motion, vivid greens and yellows, soft shadows, and expressive character design. 16:9, 4K, 24fps, warm daylight tone.

style_elements.characters: Bear showing courage; voice-off helpers; distressed animals on vine
style_elements.environment: Vine-covered cottage roof, tangled pea tendrils reaching sky
style_elements.visual_style: Playful cartoon with dynamic movement and emotional exaggeration
style_elements.camera_movement: Tracking shot along vine, cut to low-angle hero stance

scenes.description: 小熊勇敢攀爬藤蔓,成功救下小猫,但小猫却兴奋表示还想继续玩耍,表现出对冒险的留恋。
scenes.video_prompt: The yellow bear climbs the wobbly pea vine hand-over-hand, reaching the rooftop where a small cat sits giggling atop the coiled tendrils. With a gentle grab, the bear rescues the cat, who protests playfully: 'We want to go back up!' The camera circles them in a joyful mid-air arc, capturing the height and whimsy. Bright colors, fluffy clouds, and exaggerated bounce in movements enhance the lighthearted tone. Rendered in cheerful cartoon style, 16:9, 4K, smooth animation, natural sunlight with soft highlights.

style_elements.environment: Roof-level view, swirling pea vines against sky
style_elements.visual_style: Whimsical, upbeat cartoon with bouncy physics
style_elements.camera_movement: Circular orbit around characters on roof

scenes.description: 小熊被藤蔓缠住像被面条包围,朋友调侃它平时爱吃面条,气氛由紧张转为幽默,大家笑声中缓解压力。
scenes.video_prompt: The bear becomes comically wrapped in soft, noodle-like pea tendrils, squirming gently as his friends laugh and tease: 'You love noodles, right?' Close-up on the bear’s embarrassed but smiling face, then wide shot showing the vine curling like spaghetti. Warm golden-hour lighting enhances the humor. Camera tilts down from above, emphasizing the silliness. Animated in exaggerated comic style with squash-and-stretch motion, vibrant colors, and soft textures. 16:9, 4K, 24fps, playful tone.

style_elements.characters: Bear trapped in vine; laughing off-screen friends
style_elements.environment: Ground level, vine acting like cooked pasta
style_elements.visual_style: Comedic cartoon with food-like vine texture
style_elements.camera_movement: Top-down tilt, close-ups on facial reactions

scenes.description: 小胡从仓库拿出工具,大家一起制作解决方案,充满创造力和协作精神,准备解救所有小动物。
scenes.video_prompt: A clever fox named Xiao Hu emerges from a garden shed carrying ropes, pulleys, and wooden planks. The team gathers to build a rescue device, hammering and tying with teamwork and laughter. Overhead montage shots show their progress: gears turning, ropes tightening. The mood is inventive and uplifting. Camera uses quick cuts and aerial views to highlight collaboration. Bright daylight, crisp details, and rich earthy tones dominate. Cartoon style with mechanical whimsy, 16:9, 4K, 24fps, clean lines and expressive gestures.

style_elements.characters: Fox inventor; cooperative bear and animal team
style_elements.environment: Backyard workshop, wooden shed, tools spread out
style_elements.visual_style: Inventive cartoon with DIY charm and mechanical fun
style_elements.camera_movement: Aerial montage, quick cuts between actions

scenes.description: 他们用装置成功控制藤蔓,将豌豆浆妥善处理,并决定为豌豆寻找新家,体现环保与关爱自然的理念。
scenes.video_prompt: The team activates their invention—a vine-slowing machine made of wood and rope—gently lowering the pea tendrils. They collect the slippery pea goo into a cart, heading toward a compost bin. One suggests: 'Let’s give the pea plant a new home.' Cut to them planting it in a park as a decorative centerpiece. Camera pans from action to serene park setting. Soft focus transitions, warm sunlight, and gentle music imply closure. Rendered in eco-friendly visual tone, 16:9, 4K, 24fps, harmonious color palette.

style_elements.environment: Garden path, compost bin, city park
style_elements.camera_movement: Panning from action to peaceful resolution

scenes.description: 小猫在小熊怀里睡着,主人购物归来发现后感动,小熊分享经历,温馨家庭氛围浮现。
scenes.video_prompt: The little cat sleeps peacefully in the bear’s arms as a woman returns from shopping, surprised and touched. She smiles: 'Your mom was looking for you.' The bear recounts the adventure warmly. Scene lit with golden late-afternoon glow. Close-ups on sleeping kitten and grateful faces. Camera slowly pushes in on the reunion, then pulls back to show the cottage garden. Soft bokeh, warm tones, gentle animation. Family-friendly cartoon style, 16:9, 4K, 24fps, emotionally soothing pace.

style_elements.characters: Sleeping kitten; caring mother figure; humble hero bear
style_elements.environment: Front yard of cottage, shopping bags nearby
style_elements.visual_style: Warm, emotional cartoon with tender lighting
style_elements.camera_movement: Push-in and pull-out on family moment

scenes.description: 为了庆祝胜利,小熊准备了豌豆米饭,但小猫因刚才的经历不敢吃,引发大家欢笑。
scenes.video_prompt: The bear proudly presents a large bowl of steaming green pea rice, announcing a celebration meal. The kitten recoils playfully: 'No! After that giant vine, I can’t eat peas!' Everyone bursts into laughter. Close-ups on the funny reaction and exaggerated disgust. Kitchen interior with rustic wooden table and hanging pots. Overhead shot of the meal, then zooms into the trembling bowl. Bright, saturated colors, comedic timing, bouncy animation. 16:9, 4K, 24fps, joyful atmosphere with soft kitchen lighting.

style_elements.characters: Bear chef; disgusted kitten; laughing group
style_elements.camera_movement: Overhead meal shot, zoom to facial expressions

scenes.description: 大家举行盛大的豌豆舞会,欢快跳舞庆祝,传递快乐与团结的节日气氛。
scenes.video_prompt: A festive pea-themed dance party begins in the garden—characters twirl under string lights shaped like peas. Music swells as they jump and spin in rhythm. The bear leads a conga line around the now-tamed vine. Colorful confetti falls like leaves. Wide rotating crane shot captures the joy, ending with a starry sky reveal. Vibrant hues, glowing lanterns, and energetic motion define the scene. Whimsical cartoon style, 16:9, 4K, 24fps, cinematic finish with celebratory music.

style_elements.environment: Night garden with pea-shaped lights and decorations
style_elements.visual_style: Festive, magical cartoon with holiday spirit
style_elements.camera_movement: Rotating crane shot, wide celebration capture
